beats.text: A black F-250 lurches half onto the curb. The engine keeps running for a three-count after the door opens.
A very large, very silent man in a cutoff walks across the lawn at a speed that is somehow both slow and inevitable.
Dad looks at Karen. Karen looks at the man. The man looks only at Dad. A bee is the loudest thing in the yard.

end_a.text: Dad plants his feet. Says nothing. The man eventually nods once and walks back to his truck. Nobody speaks for a full minute.

end_b.text: "Misunderstanding," the man repeats. He files that word away somewhere. He'll be back to it.
